title: Discrete Mathematics - Set Theory and Algebra - Identify Function

questions.question:
\( A=\{0,1,2,3, \ldots\} \) is the set of non-negative integers. Let \( F \) be the set of functions from \( A \) to itself. For any two functions, \( f_{1}, f_{2} \in \mathrm{~F} \), we define

\[ \left(f_{1} \odot f_{2}\right)(n)=f_{1}(n)+f_{2}(n) \]

for every number \( n \) in \( A \). Which of the following is/are CORRECT about the mathematical structure \( (\mathrm{F}, \odot) \) ?



GATE CSE 2025 | Set 1 | Question: 39
